data.text: P04/04 FELISIAN WITH A MUTED BLUE TINGE, AND LOTS OF STORMS. SEVERAL
LANINGS AT 177.60, 158.39, 140.60, 71.109 WERE ON MOUNTAINOUS BARREN
GROUND. AT 71.110 IT PROVED TO BE ON AN EXTREME ELEVATION HILLSIDE WITH
WHAT APPEARED TO BE A OUTER CRATER RING AND AN INNER CRATER WITH A LARGE
CREVASSE, ALL UNDER STANGE LIGHTING WHICH COULD JUST BE A WEATHER THING
. AT 180.64 IT WAS GRASSY LAND WITH SMALL PLANTS BUT NOTHING UNUSUAL.
HOPPERS AND BIRDS SPOTTED AT THE LAST TWO PLACES. PRO. 104.760 PRV 0.
